Design System v0.7.3
Overview Foundations Components Themes Playground
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component
Navigation
  • Accordion Component
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component
Overlay
  • Drawer Component
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
Form

Slider Component

Wrapper um `<input type="range" class="range">` mit Label, Value-Display und optionaler Skala. Native input behält Form-Integration, Keyboard (Pfeil-Tasten, PageUp/Down, Home/End) und Screen-Reader-Support.

Track-Fill kommt aus dem erweiterten .range (linear-gradient + custom property --range-fill-pct). Konsument updated die Property via JS.

Beispiele

50
050100
HTML anzeigen 
<div class="slider">
  <div class="slider__header">
    <label class="slider__label" for="vol">Lautstärke</label>
    <output class="slider__value" for="vol">50</output>
  </div>
  <input type="range" id="vol" class="range" min="0" max="100" value="50">
  <div class="slider__scale">
    <span>0</span><span>50</span><span>100</span>
  </div>
</div>

Diskrete Ticks (Browser-native, optional)

HTML anzeigen 
<input type="range" class="range" list="ticks">
<datalist id="ticks">
  <option value="0"><option value="25"><option value="50">
</datalist>

Token-Contract

Keine eigenen Tokens — Component nutzt zentrale semantic-Tokens.

Source-CSS ansehen
